name: Cucumber "Noodles" with Tomato Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1 pound plum tomatoes, peeled, seeded, and chopped into small pieces
1 large garlic clove, minced after blanching in water for 3 minutes
1 pickled jalapeno pepper, seeded and minced
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the cucumbers lengthwise into 1/8 inch thick "noodles" about 1/2 inch wide.
2. In a bowl, toss the cucumber noodles with salt and let stand for 10 minutes.
3. Make the salsa by stirring together the chopped tomatoes, sliced scallion, minced garlic, pickled jalapeno pepper, white-wine vinegar, and sugar.
4. Drain the cucumbers in a colander, rinse under cold water, and pat dry on paper towels.
5. Just before serving, toss the cucumber noodles with the salsa to combine.
6. Serves 6.
Converted from GOURMET by Donna Webster (donna@webster.demon.co.uk)
